opportunities.rationale: NVDA closed $220.61 (May 19, Perplexity Finance), AH $221.52. Above 20d SMA $212.47 and 50d SMA $194.77 — strong bullish alignment. RSI ~64 (Moneycontrol) — elevated but not overbought. Q1 FY27 earnings May 20 AMC, consensus $78-80B rev, EPS ~$1.77; options market pricing ~8% move (bgsaxo.it). Entry at current $215-221 zone anchored to 20d SMA support at $212.47. Stop below $205 (prior structure, below round number). Target $240 aligned to R2 pivot $234.96 + post-earnings gap extension. R:R 1:2.1. Invalidated on guidance miss below $76B revenue or VIX spike above 22.
